description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted representation of an adult pedestrian, with elongated and stretched limbs and body parts that extend in unnatural directions. The figure's torso and legs are visible, but the geometry is warped, creating sharp, spiked extensions from the arms and legs. The head and hair are somewhat discernible, though also affected by the distortion, and the overall form is fragmented and abstract. The clothing is suggested by the presence of different surface textures and shapes, but the details are obscured by the severe mesh deformation. The object does not resemble a typical human figure due to the extreme stretching and overlapping of body parts. The surface appears smooth in some areas, with a matte finish, and the colors are distributed in irregular patches.
description: A severely distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated, spiked limbs and fragmented body parts, featuring smooth, matte surfaces and irregular color patches.
description_view_0: From this view, the head, upper torso, and several elongated, spiked extensions are most visible, with the figure's face and hair partially discernible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the extreme stretching of the limbs and the sharp, angular extensions projecting from the body, with less visibility of the head.
description_view_2: Seen from above, the warped legs and torso are prominent, and the overall fragmentation of the figure is most apparent.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the elongated limbs and the abstract, spiked geometry, with the body appearing almost unrecognizable as a human form.
attribute_posture: contorted and stretched, with limbs extended in unnatural directions
